scripts.dev: npm run prepare:ollama && npm run prepare:whisper && npm run native:prepare -- dev && concurrently -k "vite" "tsup --config tsup.config.ts --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main/main.js && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run native:prepare -- build && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: npm run prepare:ollama && npm run prepare:whisper && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:dir: npm run prepare:ollama && npm run prepare:whisper && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dir
